form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after four months 7th of 9 at this track on March 5 over 274m, 6 len behind Jk Double Trouble with 56kg at $51.60. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Will Rogers Downs on October 26 over 366m, 4 len behind Kvn Design carrying 56.5kg at $18.50. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 55 day let-up. Most recently 4th of 9 at Los Alamitos Qh in G1 on February 14 over 366m, 1.1 len behind Doodah Cartel with 57kg at $9.30. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Los Alamitos Qh on January 24 over 366m, 0.3 len behind Shinning Favorite carrying 57kg at $2.60. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 10 at this track on March 8 over 320m, 6 len behind Luziana Man carrying 56kg at $10.90. The race before that won by 1.3 len at Sunland Park February 6 over 320m defeating Oh Eagle Rose carrying 57kg at $2.40. Beaten comfortably last start but is capable of better.
